extra.reason: Sidecar v1 built and verified. Commit 704c1d5 added sidecar/proxy.py + start_sidecar.cmd + .gitignore. All 5 verification checks pass: clean start, non-stream passthrough+capture (Authorization redacted, routing_info populated), streaming passthrough (incremental SSE), redaction never leaks upstream (200 not 401), concurrency (ThreadingHTTPServer + CAPTURE_LOCK, non-interleaved lines). Capture analysis also corrected session-identity assumption: prompt_cache_key is the real session id, not previous_response_id. Routing facts recorded in agent_docs/routing/.
